# UC-13.6.14 · Grafana Provisioned Dashboard and Data Source Config Drift

## Description

As-code provisioning should be the source of truth; manual UI edits to provisioned objects create drift that the next sync overwrites unexpectedly. Combining provisioning logs with datasource content hashes exposes shadow changes.

## Value

Prevents surprise dashboard loss during deploys and keeps staging/prod aligned.

## Implementation

Prefer emitting `json_sha256` from CI for expected state and join in Splunk. Simplify the `append` subsearch if only logs are available: alert on provisioning error lines alone.

## SPL

```spl
index=observability sourcetype="grafana:log" component=provisioning
| search "provisioned dashboard" OR "provisioned datasource" OR "provisioning"
| search failed OR error OR "cannot delete" OR mismatch OR "already exists" OR "invalid"
| stats count, values(path) as paths, values(name) as objects, latest(_raw) as sample by provisioner, host
| where count >= 1
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Diff table, timeline of provisioning errors, single-value (drift count).

## References

- [Grafana — Provisioning](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/administration/provisioning/)
- [Splunk Lantern — use case library](https://lantern.splunk.com/)
